temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A close-up shot reveals the face of an elderly woman with pale, wrinkled skin and dark, sunken eyes. Her expression is one of deep sadness and fear, with her lips slightly parted. The lighting is dim and moody, casting a blue-green hue on her face. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a somber and mysterious tone, introducing a key character who appears to be in a state of distress or despair.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous, and suspenseful musical score begins to build.)
(00:02-00:05) The scene cuts to a low-angle view of a dark, gothic-style building at night. The sky is filled with swirling, ethereal clouds illuminated by a faint, turquoise-colored light, resembling a massive, supernatural storm. (Storyline: This shot establishes the setting, a foreboding gothic location, and reinforces the supernatural or magical element of the story with the strange celestial phenomena.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous, orchestral score continues, swelling slightly to enhance the sense of awe and danger.)
